mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TAB_GOODS (S_ID, S_TENANT_ID, S_CODE, S_NAME, S_CATEGORY, S_SPEC, S_BASE_UNIT, I_STATUS, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER) VALUES (#{sId}, #{sTenantId}, #{sCode}, #{sName}, #{sCategory}, #{sSpec}, #{sBaseUnit}, #{iStatus}, #{dtCreateTime}, #{dtUpdateTime}, #{sCreateUser}, #{sUpdateUser})
mapper.update: UPDATE TAB_GOODS SET S_CODE = #{sCode}, S_NAME = #{sName}, S_CATEGORY = #{sCategory}, S_SPEC = #{sSpec}, S_BASE_UNIT = #{sBaseUnit}, I_STATUS = #{iStatus}, DT_UPDATE_TIME = #{dtUpdateTime}, S_UPDATE_USER = #{sUpdateUser} WHERE S_ID = #{sId}
mapper.select: SELECT S_ID, S_CODE, S_NAME, S_CATEGORY, S_SPEC, S_BASE_UNIT, I_STATUS, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_GOODS WHERE S_ID = #{sId}

SELECT S_ID, S_CODE, S_NAME, S_CATEGORY, S_SPEC, S_BASE_UNIT, I_STATUS, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_GOODS
ORDER BY DT_CREATE_TIME DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TAB_STOCK WHERE S_GOODS_ID = #{goodsId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TAB_STOCK_FLOW WHERE S_GOODS_ID = #{goodsId}
